theory.canonical_statement: ID 405 establishes the "Phase Transition" logic that distinguishes Trawinistic Field Theory from standard statistical thermodynamics. While conventional physics recognizes first order (discontinuous density) and second order (discontinuous heat capacity) transitions, the TZP manifests as a transition of infinite order. At the critical coordinate tauc, every derivative of the thermodynamic potential undergoes asymptotic divergence. This absolute divergence is the fundamental mechanism that induces the deltagnu [ID 404]. It proves that the observed phenomenon of gravity is a volumetric displacement force generated by the release of isotropic vacuum pressure residue at the singularity. By anchoring the coordinate system at p, the framework successfully resolves Academic Paradigm Dominance Bias, shifting the interpretation from "force" to "vibrating code" geometry.
